name: Sentry
description: Debug production errors, query issues, and analyze performance (local stdio with PAT)
longDescription: Official Sentry MCP server for interacting with Sentry data. Query issues, get error details, analyze performance, and use AI-powered search. Requires local stdio transport with Sentry User Auth Token (remote endpoint is OAuth-only). Also requires an LLM provider (OpenAI or Anthropic) for AI-powered tools.
author: Sentry

apiKeyConfig.label: Sentry User Auth Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a User Auth Token at sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens/ with required scopes

examplePrompts: Find the latest errors in my project
Explain the root cause of issue #1234
Search for errors related to 'database connection'
Show me performance regressions in the last deploy
Suggest a fix for this TypeError
